texto: I can give or take elephants
autor: I never can find the cheetah-but the zebras captivate me. They'd be one of the few things that would fit if we were lucky enough to live in a world that's black or white.
explicacao: Citação de I never can find the cheetah-but the zebras captivate me. They'd be one of the few things that would fit if we were lucky enough to live in a world that's black or white. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I can give or take elephants” articula reflexao, jodi-picoult, my-sister-s-keeper em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como my-sister-s-keeper.
